reviews.review_description:
While playing I was afraid I paid for this game. After verifying I noticed it was free actually.

The game is about 20 minutes, but it's poorly optimized.

I really liked the concept, but Argo was a little too talkative for my liking- maybe we see a part 2 with more stations* 

SPOILER ALERT




*and the new Argo?

i love ARGO so much. very charming little game, 10/10. 

i came here after playing Lost at the Forever Mine and was not disappointed. Field Day is a very underrated studio and i’ve loved every one of their releases i’ve played. educational and cute, and plenty of silly robot fellows. perfection.
